title: Phionyx Subagent Chain Block v0.1
description: Active specification for the `subagent_chain` block reserved in Reasoned Governance Envelope (RGE) v0.2 §2.2.3 as `reserved-for-v0.6.0-f5`. v0.1 defines the protocol-agnostic shape used to record multi-agent (parent → child → grandchild → leaf) handoff evidence inside a per-turn RGE envelope. Full A2A adapter shipped separately in v1.1.

status.description: v0.1 envelopes MUST set `active`. The RGE v0.2 reserved value `reserved-for-v0.6.0-f5` is migrated to `active` upon F5 adoption.

agent_id.description: Stable identifier of THIS agent in the chain. For LangGraph supervisors the node name; for A2A the agent-card URI fragment; for AGNTCY/ACP the agent DID.

role.description: Position in the chain for THIS turn. `root` is the originating agent (no parent); `child` is any intermediate node that both receives a handoff and emits one; `leaf` receives a handoff and does not delegate further.

chain_depth.description: Depth of this agent in the chain. `root` MUST have depth=0; every child increments by 1. Bounded by `max_chain_depth` (recommended 16) in production runtimes; producers exceeding the bound MUST set `protocol_data.depth_exceeded=true` and emit a `runtime_anomaly_flag` in the parent RGE envelope.

protocol.description: Inter-agent protocol identifier. `a2a` covers Linux Foundation Agentic AI Foundation Agent2Agent envelopes; `agntcy` covers Cisco/Outshift AGNTCY/ACP; `langgraph_subgraph` covers LangGraph supervisor handoffs (the v0.5.0 PhionyxLangGraphSupervisor adapter); `crewai` and `autogen` cover their respective Python frameworks; `phionyx_native` is a Phionyx-internal handoff between two RGE producers without a third-party protocol.

parent_envelope_hash.description: Hash of the parent agent's `integrity.current` field, copied verbatim. NULL when role=`root`. Establishes the cross-envelope hash chain that lets a verifier walk parent envelopes from any child envelope without side-channel metadata.

parent_agent_id.description: Optional. The parent's `agent_id`. NULL when role=`root`. Producers SHOULD populate this when known; it lets evidence-inspector UIs render the chain without resolving `parent_envelope_hash` against the store first.

child_agent_ids.description: Optional. For non-leaf nodes, the `agent_id` of each child this agent handed off to during this turn. Empty array when role=`leaf` or when this agent has not yet emitted any handoffs in this turn. Fan-out (multiple entries) is permitted.

handoff_signature.description: Signed handoff payload from the parent. Format: `ed25519:<hex>` in Core, `demo-hmac:<hex>` in the launch wrapper. NULL when role=`root`. The signed body is the canonical-JSON encoding of `{parent_envelope_hash, parent_agent_id, child_agent_id, child_protocol, handoff_timestamp_utc}` as specified in §3.1 of the v0.1 RFC. The signing key MUST be the parent runtime's own signing key (same key used for the parent envelope's `integrity.signature`).

handoff_timestamp_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which the parent finalised the handoff (i.e. emitted the parent envelope). NULL when role=`root`. MUST equal the parent envelope's `subject.timestamp_utc` when both are available. Replay protection: a child envelope whose handoff timestamp is older than `replay_window_seconds` (recommended 300s) MUST be flagged.

protocol_data.description: Protocol-specific extension payload. Open object. Reserved keys: `depth_exceeded` (boolean), `replay_window_seconds_used` (integer), `a2a_task_id` (string, A2A only), `agntcy_acp_envelope_id` (string, AGNTCY only), `langgraph_thread_id` (string, LangGraph only). Producers MUST namespace any non-reserved key by protocol (`a2a_*`, `crewai_*`, etc.).
